regions.group_name: 电机外形及轴端尺寸图

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整标注源图中对应蓝框内的电机侧视机械图，包含外形轮廓、轴端、键槽、螺纹孔'M3深6'、尺寸'25±1'、'105±1'、'59MAX'、直径尺寸及形位公差'0.04 A'、'0.03'等机械尺寸标注，属于机械结构尺寸图。

text_annotations.correction_note: Added visible perpendicularity symbol from same feature control frame; OCR captured numeric value and datum only.
Corrected OCR '030-0.021' to diameter callout with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.021.
Corrected OCR '?0.04' and combined with datum A in the same feature control frame.
Corrected compact OCR '9.2-0.1' to bilateral limit format with upper deviation 0.
Corrected OCR '08-0.013' to diameter callout with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.013.
Added visible geometric tolerance symbol associated with OCR numeric value.

terminology_notes: 深 means depth in the M3 threaded hole callout.
MAX indicates a maximum allowable envelope dimension.
translation_notes: KEY retained as an English feature label.
Diameter callouts normalized using Ø/diameter notation.

dimension_records.reason: Top key detail view shows the longitudinal key dimension as 14.
Top key cross-section detail shows the key width as 3.
Both KEY labels identify the keyed shaft feature and are not dimensional values.

Leader points to a threaded hole on the shaft/key area and the callout states M3 depth 6.
Right-side vertical dimension spans the outer envelope height and is marked MAX.

Dimension is placed adjacent to the keyed shaft area and indicates a unilateral tolerance.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径8 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.013 mm
dimension_records.reason: Vertical diameter callout at the shaft end indicates Ø8 with unilateral negative tolerance.
Boxed A marks the datum feature for related geometric tolerances.
Bottom local dimension near the motor end step is marked 3.
Bottom local dimension near the motor end step is marked 5.
Feature control frame contains a visible geometric tolerance symbol and value 0.03; exact tolerance type is not fully reliable from OCR.
Bottom horizontal dimension from shaft shoulder to reference plane is marked 25±1.
Long bottom horizontal dimension spans the main motor body length and is marked 105±1.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: M3 threaded hole depth 6 is called out near the shaft/key feature. Other mounting interface details are not specified in this region.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft interface includes Ø30 +0/-0.021, Ø8 +0/-0.013, key length 14, key width 3, key-related 9.2 +0/-0.1, and shaft extension 25±1.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Main body length is 105±1 and maximum envelope height is 59MAX.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector geometry is visible in the drawing, but no connector-specific OCR text annotation is available in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: The exact type of some feature-control-frame symbols is partly unresolved because OCR captured only the numeric/datum portions.

unresolved_items.issue: Overlapping or partial OCR fragments around the left vertical tolerance stack and shaft diameter area were not used as independent annotations because better overlapping source boxes were selected or the fragments are noise/duplicates.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Review only if symbol-level geometric tolerance classification is required.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该图为电机端面局部尺寸视图，包含中心孔、安装孔与外形定位尺寸，且可见 '045±0.1'、'046±0.1'、'2-4.3'、'45°'、'□40' 等机械尺寸标注，属于典型机械结构尺寸图。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected OCR '045±0.1' to diameter callout 'Φ45±0.1' based on visible diameter symbol and engineering notation.
Corrected OCR '046±0.1' to diameter callout 'Φ46±0.1' based on visible diameter symbol and engineering notation.
OCR captured only '5'; corrected to the visible angular callout '45°' associated with the same source area.
Corrected OCR '40' to square dimension '□40' based on visible square symbol before 40.

dimension_records.reason: Leader line points to the central circular mounting/locating feature; OCR text was corrected from leading zero to diameter symbol.
Leader line points to an adjacent concentric circular mounting feature; visible callout is a diameter dimension with bilateral tolerance.
Angular callout is visible near the lower-right mounting hole, but OCR detected only part of the text.
Bottom dimension uses a square symbol followed by 40, indicating the square mounting face size.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front mounting face includes Φ45±0.1 and Φ46±0.1 concentric locating dimensions, a 45° angular hole position callout, and □40 square face size.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped region.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Square mounting face size is □40; other envelope dimensions are not specified in this crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Not specified in this cropped region.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: A visible 2-4.3 hole callout appears in the target image, but no OCR source_id was provided, so it is not included as a final annotation.

unresolved_items.description: Visible callout '2-4.3' appears near the lower-right mounting hole, but no corresponding OCR source_id is available.
unresolved_items.reason: Cannot output or reference text without an existing OCR source_id.

labels.label_text_original: 动力线 Power 引线号 信号定义

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域和全图黄色标注位置均显示动力线接线表，表头包含'引线号 Pin No'和'信号定义 Defintion'，并给出1-U、2-V、3-W、4-PE的针脚与动力相线/保护地对应关系，属于动力接口针脚定义。

必须同时满足：

2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是反馈接口针脚定义表，左侧标注‘反馈线 / Feedback’，右侧逐行给出1到7号引脚及对应信号‘DC +5V、GND、VB+、VB-、SD+、SD-、Shield’，明显属于编码器/反馈信号连接器的针脚分配说明。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框在完整图纸标题栏附近，对应一个标注为'未注线性公差'和'Undeclared linear tolerance'的公差表，列出尺寸范围0.5~3、>3~6、>6~30、>30~120、>120~400及对应±0.2至±1.2的线性公差，属于机械图纸尺寸与公差信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域显示连接器型号 'SC-MC7P-JN-D' 及其针位示意，结合整张标记源图中对应反馈连接器表格可见该型号对应 7 芯反馈接口，并给出了 DC+5V、GND、VB+、VB-、SD+、SD-、Shield 等针脚功能，因此属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Left upper pin label; tight box on visible '4' glyph, excluding adjacent black terminal body.
The standalone upper '3' is largely obscured/overlapped by the bold central '3S' marking and connector graphics; box covers the visible glyph portion closest to the supplied initial position.
No clearly readable standalone '2' is visible at the hinted location; box is placed on the only visible dark glyph-like strokes in that region, but the character identity is highly ambiguous.
Right upper pin label; tight box on visible '1' glyph, excluding nearby terminal body.
Lower left pin label; box follows the visible '7' glyph and avoids the adjacent terminal body.
The hinted '6' overlaps the bold central marking and is not cleanly readable; box covers the visible glyph-like portion nearest the supplied location.
Lower right pin label; tight box on visible '5' glyph, excluding adjacent terminal body.
Bold central marking appears visually closer to '38' than '3S' due to stroke merging, but this box covers the supplied '3S' text region.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; omit uncertain invisible text.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No dimensional unit is specified in this cropped connector pinout; do not infer dimensional values.
terminology_rules: Use Connector / Cable Interface for pinout and connector markings.
Treat visible numerals as pin identification labels, not dimensions.

ambiguous_terms.note_zh: 中心粗体标记疑似为模具或方向标识，工程含义不确定。
ambiguous_terms.note_en: Central bold marking appears to be a molded or orientation mark; engineering meaning is uncertain.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Connector detail shows seven visible pin identification labels: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连接器细节图显示7个可见针脚编号：1、2、3、4、5、6、7。
dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: These are pin labels, not dimensional values.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 这些为针脚编号，不是尺寸数值。

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Visible central connector marking, interpreted as 3S with low confidence.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 可见连接器中心标记，低置信度识别为3S。
dimension_records.ambiguity_notes_en: Exact characters and functional meaning are uncertain.
dimension_records.ambiguity_notes_zh: 字符及功能含义不确定。

frontend_table_records.specification: Connector detail shows seven visible pin identification labels: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7.
Visible central connector marking, interpreted as 3S with low confidence.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 连接器细节图显示7个可见针脚编号：1、2、3、4、5、6、7。
可见连接器中心标记，低置信度识别为3S。

mounting_interface.zh: 本裁剪区域仅显示反馈连接器针脚视图，未显示安装接口尺寸。
mounting_interface.en: This crop only shows a feedback connector pinout view; no mounting interface dimensions are visible.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 本区域未包含轴、键或键槽信息。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft, key, or keyway information is present in this region.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 未标注外形尺寸或间隙尺寸。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No overall envelope or clearance dimensions are called out.

connector_considerations.zh: 可见7个针脚编号1至7；中心标记疑似3S但含义不明。
connector_considerations.en: Seven pin labels, 1 through 7, are visible; the central marking appears to be 3S but its meaning is unclear.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 未能从IMAGE 1可靠读取连接器型号文字；针脚功能定义未在此裁剪图中显示。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector model text is not reliably visible in IMAGE 1; pin functions are not shown in this cropped view.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 连接器型号文字在IMAGE 1中不可可靠确认。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Connector model text cannot be reliably confirmed from IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.recommended_action_zh: 如需型号，请使用更清晰的目标裁剪图重新提取。
unresolved_items.recommended_action_en: Use a clearer target crop if the connector model is required.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 针脚功能定义未在目标裁剪图中显示。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Pin function assignments are not visible in the target crop.
unresolved_items.recommended_action_zh: 应从完整针脚表或连接器定义表读取。
unresolved_items.recommended_action_en: Read pin functions from the full pinout table or connector definition table.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机性能参数表，包含额定功率、转速、转矩、电流、惯量、绝缘等级、防护等级等规格信息；结合整张标注源图可见该表位于图纸下半部分的独立参数区，不是曲线图也不是连接器针脚定义，因此按现有类别中最接近的机械尺寸类归档。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标区域为'TN曲线图 TN Graph'，含转矩纵轴和转速横轴'rpm'，并标注短时工作区、连续工作区及坐标点如'(3000, 1.11)'、'(6000, 0.16)'，表达电机转矩-转速性能关系。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框为'制动器性能参数Brake performance parameters'表格，列出静力矩'N•m 0.32'以及制动时间、释放时间、额定电压、吸合电压等电机制动器性能数据；虽然不是曲线，但在给定类别中最接近电机性能参数图表类。

labels.label_text_original: 编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于整页右下角的编码器相关表格，标题为'编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters'，内容包含'类型Type'和'分辨率Resolution'等反馈编码器性能信息；在现有类别中与编码器/反馈器信息最接近，因此归入反馈连接器针脚定义类。

records.label_text_original: 编码器性能参数Encoder performance parameters
